mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_VOLUN_APPLY ( VOLUN_ACT_NO, USER_NO, VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS, VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE ) VALUES ( #{volunActNo}, #{userNo}, NOW(), 1, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1, VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE = NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY VA.Volun_Act_No DESC) AS RN, VA.Volun_Act_No AS volunActNo, VA.Volun_Act_Title AS volunActTitle, VA.Volun_Act_Point AS volunActPoint, VA.Volun_Act_Address AS volunActAddress,
CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND DATE_ADD(VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End, INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN '모집중' WHEN NOW() < VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin THEN '모집예정' ELSE '모집마감' END AS recruStatus
FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY VA ORDER BY VA.Volun_Act_No DESC LIMIT 10
